title: Charge-Offs & Recoveries
content:
Sub-header "Charge-Offs & Recoveries":
Paragraph 1 — The credit union reported a year-to-date gross charge-off total of $64,827. Losses were concentrated in the All Other Unsecured Loans/Lines of Credit segment at $64,797.

Paragraph 2 — Recovery data was not disclosed in the source materials for this period.

Paragraph 3 — Management will continue to focus on collections and portfolio monitoring as charge-off activity remains elevated compared to prior periods.
